summary: Draft a concise 5-bullet operator note on the next two improvements for roaming swarm ops after worker boot: control plane, heartbeats, routing, and task quality. Keep it tight and practical.
body:
# Operator Bridge Task

## Task
Draft a concise 5-bullet operator note on the next two improvements for roaming swarm ops after worker boot: control plane, heartbeats, routing, and task quality. Keep it tight and practical.

## Scope
synthesis, operations

## Constraints
(none)

## Expected Output
memo

## Payload
{
  "target_agent": "kimi-claw-phone"
}
